executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest for chatbot executor API with dependencies Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, scripts for start and dev modes, and engine requirement Node >=18.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js Express server providing authenticated POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files, using ESLint and a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a Self-Recursive Bot React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and highlight.js for code highlighting.

keywords.json.summary: A JSON file containing pre-defined keywords and one-sentence summaries for other files in the project, used as an index.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints with CORS headers for a specific origin.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to DeepSeek's chat completions API, supporting streaming via SSE and non-streaming JSON responses, using an API key from environment variables.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to a Railway API service, rewriting the URL path suffix and passing an authentication token from environment variables.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to the Firecrawl search API, accepting a query and count, returning cleaned search results with domain extraction.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: Edge function that returns a GitHub Personal Access Token from environment variables on GET requests with CORS headers.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: Edge function that proxies POST requests to the LangSearch web search API, forwarding the request body and API key.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: This Netlify Edge Function proxies POST requests to OpenRouter's chat completions API, handling authentication, streaming, and error responses.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: Injects a script into index.html to bypass a login gate in Netlify deploy-preview contexts.

preferences.json.summary: Configuration file for a self-improving bot with editable preferences for clarification, planning, execution, and review.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: Main chat component with settings, live run state, error logging, and token budget, using multiple subcomponents and stores.

src/components/SimpleChat/ChatPane.js.summary: Renders chat messages with responsive styling, user/agent differentiation, and an optional RunCard for live run state.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: Renders a header component with hamburger menu, application title, current repository display, and provider configuration toggle, adapting styles for mobile widths.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: Provides a chat input bar with text input and send button, supporting compact and mobile layouts and Enter key submission.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageContent.summary: Parses and renders message content with support for code fences and thinking tags, adjusting font size and compactness.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: Renders a scrollable list of chat messages with user and agent styling, auto-scrolling to the latest message.

src/components/SimpleChat/RunCard.js.summary: Displays a collapsible run state card with phase indicator, progress bar, and logs, responsive to compact and mobile settings.

src/components/SimpleChat/Sidebar.js.summary: Export Sidebar function that renders a collapsible sidebar panel with workspace input, settings controls, and responsive width based on window width.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: Export TaskList function that displays a list of tasks with status indicators (DONE/FAILED/other) and titles, with responsive sizing for mobile.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: Export Toaster function that renders a small fixed-position toast message with color-coded border based on error or success type.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: Export SelfImprover class that orchestrates a self-improvement loop using GitHub service, LLM provider, task queue, planning, and memory, with hooks for logging and updates.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: Export WorkingMemory class that stores file summaries, observations, and builds a compact LLM prompt context from accumulated information during agentic runs.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: Builds a keyword index for large repositories by processing files in groups of 5, extracting 5-10 keywords and a short summary per file, with robust JSON extraction and retry on timeout.

src/core/execution/agenticExecutor.js.summary: Executes a single task using a read-before-write loop, delegating prompt building, edit application, quality checks, and commit verification to focused modules.

src/core/execution/commitVerifier.js.summary: Re-reads a committed file to verify its SHA matches the expected SHA, logging a warning on mismatch.

src/core/execution/promptBuilder.js.summary: Builds the LLM prompt for the agentic executor using ContextBuilder for smart file selection and injects conversation memory.

src/core/execution/qualityGate.js.summary: Runs lint and syntax checks before commit, retrying up to 2 times with LLM-generated fixes for errors.

src/core/execution/searchReplaceHandler..summary: Applies SEARCH/REPLACE or legacy update_editor blocks to build a fileMap for commit, with error handling and retry logic for failed matches.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: Discovers relevant files based on a keyword index or fallback filename scan, scoring and returning the top 8 matches for a given goal.

src/core/goalVerifier.js.summary: Verifies whether the feature-branch diff achieves the original goal by asking an LLM to judge, returning achieved status and reason.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: Indexes slash commands and provides fuzzy matching via Levenshtein distance to find the best command match for a user input.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: Loads or builds a manifest.json file from source code, either from the repository or by parsing JS files in the file tree.

src/core/manifestUpdater.js.summary: ManifestUpdater incrementally updates manifest.json after code changes by re-parsing exports and imports of modified files using static regex, then recomputes importedBy for the entire manifest.

src/core/orchestration/clarificationQueu.summary: ClarificationQueue replaces window.prompt() with a state-machine that saves questions to ConversationMemory, returns a Promise that resolves when the user replies, and clears timeout on resolution.

src/core/orchestration/cycleExecutor.js.summary: runCycles runs an execute-and-review loop up to 3 cycles, using parallel execution, persistent memory save/load, and stops early if all reviews pass.

src/core/orchestration/pauseController.j.summary: createPauseController returns an object with methods to request, check, and reset a boolean pause flag.

src/core/orchestration/postRunActions.js.summary: runPostActions performs post-review steps including manifest self-update, regression detection, goal verification, PR creation, and smoke test, returning success status and committed files.

src/core/orchestration/runSetup.js.summary: Handles pre-planning setup including conversation memory initialization, error context detection and enrichment, loading user preferences, and creating a feature branch.

src/core/parallelExec.js.summary: Executes pending tasks in parallel with a configurable concurrency limit, using file locking to avoid conflicts.

src/core/persistentMemory.js.summary: Handles saving and loading working memory to/from the repository, scoped by a run ID to prevent overwrites.

src/core/planner.js.summary: Creates a plan by sending a prompt to an LLM with discovered file context, returning a JSON structure with tasks for code changes.

src/core/planning/agenticPlanner.js.summary: Implements an agentic planner that iteratively reads files, summarizes them, and decides next actions to build a plan.

src/core/planning/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: Multi‑agent plan creation that groups candidate files by top‑level directory, runs parallel exploration agents per directory, and merges summaries via coordinator agent to produce a plan with files or subGoals for hierarchical execution.

src/core/planning/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: Extends planners to decompose complex goals into sub‑goals using an LLM‑based decision and decomposition, producing a plan with tasks that include subGoals.

src/core/planning/plannerFactory.js.summary: Selects the appropriate planner based on discovery cache size, using agentic or coordinated planner wrapped in hierarchical planning.

src/core/prCreator.js.summary: Creates a GitHub pull request with a title derived from the goal and returns the PR URL.

src/core/regressionDetector.js.summary: Finds files that import changed files and checks via LLM whether expected symbols still exist, flagging regressions.

src/core/reviewer.js.summary: Reviews completed tasks by comparing original and committed file contents, enforces goal alignment, and reports line-level issues.

src/core/taskQueue.js.summary: Manages a task queue with TODO/DONE/FAILED statuses and methods for querying and updating task states.

src/core/taskQueueUtils.js.summary: Sorts tasks in topological order respecting their dependency constraints to ensure proper execution sequence.

src/main.js.summary: Initializes the application with React, wires up stores and services, and creates a SelfImprover instance for autonomous code improvement.

src/services/PreferencesService.js.summary: Manages user preferences stored in a preferences.json file in the repository, providing load and save operations with sensible defaults.

src/services/conversationMemory.js.summary: Provides structured cross-run memory for storing and updating conversation context (goal, phase, decisions, failed attempts) per repository and branch using localStorage.

src/services/errorIngestion.js.summary: Parses stack traces to extract file paths and line numbers, and builds a structured error context string for the planner.

src/services/executorApi.js.summary: Provides methods to call lint and syntax endpoints via a Netlify edge proxy, with fail‑open fallback for network errors.

src/services/github.js.summary: Provides static methods to interact with GitHub API for fetching file tree, loading file content, and committing multiple files to a branch.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: Encapsulates communication with language models via Netlify proxies, supporting timeout, fast model override, and thinking mode parameters.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: SmokeTest class provides static methods to poll a Netlify deploy-preview URL until the page renders correctly, with configurable timeout and interval.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: ProviderStore is a Zustand persistent store that holds the AI provider, selected model, thinking mode, and reasoning effort settings.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: WorkspaceStore is a Zustand persistent store that manages workspace state including current repository, branch, GitHub token, and a flag to remember keys.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: processAgentSkills parses AI replies to extract structured actions such as update_editor blocks and SEARCH/REPLACE blocks for safe file edits.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: ContextBuilder builds a prompt context string by selecting target and related files from a manifest, respecting a token budget, and providing full content for target files and interface-only for related files.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: Builds a dependency graph for JavaScript files by parsing ES module imports/exports and creating a map of file dependencies with reverse lookups.

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: Runs JavaScript code in a sandboxed iframe with pre-loaded modules and a timeout, returning the result of a health check.

src/utils/searchReplace.js.summary: Applies SEARCH/REPLACE blocks to file content using a matching cascade for exact and whitespace-flexible matches, returning detailed errors for the LLM to fix.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: Removes JavaScript and CSS comments and blank lines from code to reduce prompt size.
